name: Rip & Dip
recipeInstructions:
1 Cut off a 2-inch slice from the top of the round bread loaf. Remove the center portion, leaving at least 2 inches of bread on the bottom and 1 inch on the sides.
2 Cut the remaining bread into cubes.
3 Unwrap the spinach and place it on a plate. Microwave on High for 5-8 minutes or until thawed. Drain the spinach and press to remove excess moisture.
4 In a medium bowl, microwave the cream cheese at 50% (medium) or until softened. Mix in the spinach and remaining ingredients.
5 Spoon the spinach mixture into the hollowed-out bread loaf. Serve dip with reserved bread cubes, carrot and celery sticks.
Variation: You can add Parmesan cheese, cooked crumbled bacon, sliced almonds, chopped hard-boiled eggs, shredded carrots, or pine nuts.
